name: Power Cables
description: Industrial power cables and extensions for construction site electrical distribution. Single-phase and 3-phase heavy-duty cable solutions from 16A to 63A.

machines.name: Titanex 3G 2.5mm² Single Phase Heavy Duty Extension Cable (16A)
machines.shortDescription: Titanex 3G 2.5mm² single-phase 16A heavy-duty extension cable. H07RN-F rubber sheathed for construction site power distribution to tools, lights, and small equipment.
machines.description: Titanex 3G 2.5mm² single-phase 16A heavy-duty extension cable. H07RN-F rubber sheathed for construction site power distribution to tools, lights, and small equipment. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Outer Sheath: Neoprene rubber, oil and abrasion resistant

features: H07RN-F rubber sheath rated for mechanical stress, oil, and weather — built for construction sites
2.5 mm² copper core maintains voltage under 5% drop at 25 m with 16A continuous draw
IP44 CEE industrial connectors twist-lock for a secure connection that cannot pull apart
25 m length covers a standard floor plate without needing a second extension
Neoprene sheath remains flexible at -25°C and does not soften at +60°C Gulf ambient
Colour-coded cores with numbered printing on the outer sheath for instant phase identification

machines.name: Mennekes 32A 3-Phase Heavy Duty Extension Cable (400V)
machines.shortDescription: Mennekes 32A 3-phase heavy-duty extension cable 400V. 5G 6mm² H07RN-F rubber cable for tower crane, hoist, and large machinery power distribution on construction sites.
machines.description: Mennekes 32A 3-phase heavy-duty extension cable 400V. 5G 6mm² H07RN-F rubber cable for tower crane, hoist, and large machinery power distribution on construction sites. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 32A 3-phase delivers 22 kW at 25 m — enough to run a tower crane or construction hoist
Mennekes German-made CEE connectors with reinforced strain relief for daily connection cycles
6 mm² copper per core with less than 3% voltage drop at rated current over 25 m
5-pin CEE socket with pilot contact ensures equipment cannot start with incomplete connection
Polychloroprene rubber sheath resists welding spatter, hydraulic oil, and diesel fuel contact
Colour-coded cores to IEC 60446 with durable outer printing for circuit identification

machines.name: Walther Pro 63A 5-Core Industrial Power Cable
machines.shortDescription: Walther Pro 63A 5-core industrial power cable 400V. 5G 16mm² rubber cable for main site distribution boards, generator connections, and high-power machinery supply.
machines.description: Walther Pro 63A 5-core industrial power cable 400V. 5G 16mm² rubber cable for main site distribution boards, generator connections, and high-power machinery supply. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 63A 3-phase at 16 mm² delivers 43 kW — powers a full site distribution board at 20 m distance
IP67 waterproof CEE connectors operate submerged in 1 m of water — flood-site rated
16 mm² copper with less than 2% voltage drop protects sensitive electronics on long runs
Walther Pro connectors with screw-locking ring resist vibration from heavy machinery and generators
Polychloroprene outer sheath with double insulation layer for additional mechanical protection
Pre-fitted phase rotation indicator on the plug face for instant correct-phase verification

machines.name: Nexans Lineax 4G 16mm² Rubber Flexible Cable
machines.shortDescription: Nexans Lineax 4G 16mm² rubber flexible power cable. Heavy-duty single-phase or 3-phase cable for site distribution, generator output, and temporary power installations.
machines.description: Nexans Lineax 4G 16mm² rubber flexible power cable. Heavy-duty single-phase or 3-phase cable for site distribution, generator output, and temporary power installations. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 16 mm² flexible copper stranding — bends around tight corners without kinking or fracturing
4G configuration handles 230V single-phase 63A or 400V 3-phase 50A on the same cable
30 m length bridges generator-to-distribution-board gaps on large construction sites
Flame-retardant polychloroprene sheath self-extinguishes within 30 seconds of flame removal
Nexans French manufacturing with 0.15 mm tinned copper braid for additional RF shielding
Rated -40°C to +90°C conductor temp for desert heat and cold storage without sheath failure
